body:
## Problem
Three "drummer gear evolution" pages are live and sitemapped at priority 0.82 (from Issue #1475):
- `/drummers/lars-ulrich/evolution`
- `/drummers/joey-jordison/evolution`
- `/drummers/dave-lombardo/evolution`

These pages show decade-by-decade kit evolution (data: `packages/frontend/data/drummerEvolution.js`). They currently have:
- ✅ Sitemap entries (Issue #1475)
- ✅ SSR meta (Issue #1689)
- ❌ **ZERO `/llms/` markdown files** — `ls public/llms/evolution/` → directory does not exist

Distinct from:
- `/llms/gear-history.md` (top-level price-history hub — different content type)
- `/llms/gear-history/<slug>.md` (#1782 in ai-fix — covers PRICE history pages, NOT the evolution timeline)
- `/llms/drummers/<slug>.md` (per-drummer profile — has gear snapshot but no era-by-era timeline)

AI crawlers cannot answer "how did Lars Ulrich's drum kit change over time?" or "what kit did Joey Jordison use in the 1990s vs 2000s?" without these files.

## Files to create (3 new files)
```
public/llms/evolution/lars-ulrich.md
public/llms/evolution/joey-jordison.md
public/llms/evolution/dave-lombardo.md
```

## Template per file (example structure)
```markdown
# Lars Ulrich Drum Kit Evolution — Complete Timeline

## Kill 'Em All Era (1983–1984)
- Drums: Pearl Export (entry-level)
- Cymbals: Zildjian A series
- Key characteristic: Small, fast setup — speed over power

## Master of Puppets Era (1985–1986)
- Drums: Tama Artstar II in natural maple
- Cymbals: Zildjian A Custom 17" crash, 20" ride
- Notable: First major Tama endorsement

## ...And Justice For All Era (1987–1988)
- Drums: Tama Artstar II (custom hardware)
- Production note: Heavy compression, brick-wall limiter era

## Black Album Era (1990–1993)
- Drums: Tama Artstar II (gold hardware)
- Cymbals: Zildjian series, crash pairs
- Setup: Massive double-kick rig with riser platform

## Load/ReLoad Era (1996–1997)
- Drums: Pearl Reference (transition away from Tama)

## St. Anger Era (2003)
- Drums: Tama Superstar
- Notable: No snare rim muffling, triggered/click sound

## Modern Era (2008–present)
- Drums: Tama Starclassic Custom
- Cymbals: Zildjian A Custom, K Custom

## FAQ
**Q: When did Lars Ulrich switch from Tama to Pearl?**
A: Lars used Tama through the early 1990s, switched to Pearl around the Load/ReLoad era (1996–1997), then returned to Tama.

**Q: What is Lars Ulrich's current drum kit?**
A: Lars currently endorses Tama Starclassic with Zildjian A Custom cymbals.

**Q: What drum kit did Lars Ulrich use on Master of Puppets?**
A: Tama Artstar II in natural maple — his first major Tama endorsement.
```

## Sitemap entry (api/sitemap.js)
Source from the same `DRUMMER_EVOLUTION` data used for HTML pages (Issue #1475):
```js
// Issue #XXXX: per-drummer gear evolution LLM markdown files
...Object.keys(DRUMMER_EVOLUTION).map(slug => ({ loc: `/llms/evolution/${slug}.md`, priority: '0.5', changefreq: 'monthly' })),
```
Add after the existing `DRUMMER_EVOLUTION` sitemap block (line ~503).

## Data source
`packages/frontend/data/drummerEvolution.js` and `packages/frontend/data/evolutionTimeline.js` — same data rendered on HTML pages.

## Quality gate
- Each file ≥400 words
- Timeline section per major era (≥4 eras)
- FAQ section ≥3 Q&A with date-specific answers
- Internal links to drummer profile and key album articles

## Estimated organic uplift
Targets AI citation for era-specific kit queries: "what kit did Lars Ulrich use in the 80s", "joey jordison slipknot era drum setup", "dave lombardo slayer setup evolution". Zero MetalForge LLM coverage for these queries today.

## Verify
1. `ls public/llms/evolution/` — lists 3 files
2. `curl -s "https://metalforge.io/llms/evolution/lars-ulrich.md"` — returns markdown timeline with era sections
3. `grep "llms/evolution" api/sitemap.js` — shows 3 sitemap entries
4. Each file has internal links to drummer profile and at least one album article
5. FAQ section answers are date-specific (not generic)

## Done
3 `/llms/evolution/<slug>.md` files created for Lars Ulrich, Joey Jordison, Dave Lombardo; `api/sitemap.js` updated with 3 entries sourced from `DRUMMER_EVOLUTION` keys.
title: SEO batch: /llms/evolution/<slug>.md — 3 per-drummer gear evolution LLM files (Lars Ulrich, Joey Jordison, Dave Lombardo)
